prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: PRF-PFPSMMDL-24X36-BL Product Type: WALL_ART Brand (from catalog): Productive Fitness Existing Title: Productive Fitness Poster Series Male Muscle Diagram Laminated Description: Muscle Diagram laminated poster is ideal for self-taught exercise and education.

Written and designed by experts, this poster is intended to help you learn proper exercise technique and form. Each is detailed with easy to follow step by step instructions, as well as descriptive color photos.

At 24" x 36", it is large enough to be easy to read, but compact enough to place anywhere. This is ideal for home use, personal trainer offices, doctor's offices, and gyms. Search Terms: muscle poster home exercise male muscles gym Features: - Written & Designed by Fitness Experts - Intended to Teach Proper Exercise Technique & Form - Detailed w/ Easy To Follow Step by Step Instructions - Descriptive & Colorful Photos - Ideal for Home Use === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Productive Fitness 24x36 Male Muscle Diagram Laminated Poster

openai.item_name: Productive Fitness 24x36in Black Muscle Diagram Laminated Poster

anthropic.title_differentiation: Exercise Technique Guide, Step By Step Instructions, Gym And Home Fitness, Expert Designed, Colorful Anatomy Charts
